title: Workspaces
subtitle: Persistent working directories the fleet keeps per agent and issue — they live as long as their issue does.

empty.title: No workspaces yet
empty.hint: A workspace appears here once an agent runs on an issue.

browser.unreachable: Couldn't reach the daemon holding this workspace.
browser.truncated: Listing truncated — too many files to show.
browser.file_truncated: File truncated to the first 2 MB.

delete.title: Delete this issue?
delete.body: Deleting {{issue}} permanently removes the issue and its agent workspaces ({{size}}) from disk. This can't be undone.
